title: Draft OSH&WC (Coal Mines) Regulations, 2026
note: Proposed successor to CMR 2017, made under the OSH&WC Code 2020 (s.136). In 45-day public consultation — NOT in force. CMR 2017 remains fully operative.

title: The four Labour Codes — rollout
note: Wages, Industrial Relations, Social Security and OSH&WC Codes brought into force; the (Central) Rules, 2026 were finalised 8 May 2026. Jharkhand state rules are not yet notified.

title: NCWA-XII wage settlement
note: The Twelfth National Coal Wage Agreement is under negotiation; no signed instrument has issued yet.

title: CMR 2017 — Assistant Manager scale
note: Amendment fixing the scale of appointment of Assistant Managers in coal mines.

title: Forest clearance — Van Rules 2023
note: The Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Rules, 2023 replaced the Forest (Conservation) Rules, 2022.
